div.p: Workspace summary for sales, CRM, inventory, purchase, manufacturing, maintenance, HR, helpdesk, POS, website, and alerts.
Sales KPIs, delivery delays, sales trends, and salesperson performance.

tr.td: No delayed quotations or sales orders

div.p: Lead, opportunity, conversion, expected revenue, and pipeline performance.
Stockable products, shortages, receipts, deliveries, and inventory status.
RFQs, purchase orders, receipts, vendor performance, and purchasing charts.
Manufacturing KPIs, raw material shortages, work centers, and production charts.
Maintenance requests, equipment status, teams, delays, and monthly trends.
Employee, attendance, leave, contract, and HR operating metrics.
Support tickets, SLA risk, response time, team load, and delayed ticket monitoring.
Point of Sale revenue, sessions, cashiers, payment methods, refunds, and product performance.
eCommerce orders, revenue, carts, customers, products, and online sales trends.
Centralized operational alerts across sales, inventory, purchase, manufacturing, and maintenance.
